mapper.update: UPDATE biz_store t SET t.score = ( SELECT ifnull( avg( c.score ), 0 ) FROM biz_store_comment c WHERE c.store_id = t.id and c.status IN (1, 2)), t.environment_score = ( SELECT ifnull( avg( c.environment_score ), 0 ) FROM biz_store_comment c WHERE c.store_id = t.id and c.status IN (1, 2) ), t.service_score = ( SELECT ifnull( avg( c.service_score ), 0 ) FROM biz_store_comment c WHERE c.store_id = t.id and c.status IN (1, 2)), t.taste_score = ( SELECT ifnull( avg( c.taste_score ), 0 ) FROM biz_store_comment c WHERE c.store_id = t.id and c.status IN (1, 2) ), t.comment_size = ( SELECT ifnull( count(* ), 0 ) FROM biz_store_comment c WHERE c.store_id = t.id and c.status IN (1, 2) )
